memories.content: We chose VendorX for the data platform over VendorY.
memories.author: S. Rao

memories.content: Real reason for VendorX: VendorY's pricing tripled at renewal for Client K; we could not risk the same mid-engagement. Their demo was actually better.
memories.author: S. Rao

memories.content: VendorX contract has a 40% discount locked until 2027 in exchange for a case study; do not resell at list price internally.
memories.author: finance

memories.content: Weekly standup: data migration to VendorX is two weeks behind; blocker is Client K's security review.
memories.author: pm-bot
